sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32872" key="e)kshpo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκσηπόω</orth>, <sense id="n32872.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐξιπόω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.13</biblScope> </bibl> (bis : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐξυποῖ, ἐξυπεῖ, ἐξιπεῖ</foreign> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
